div.p: Header Size: 28 bytes fixed Total Minimum Record: 32 bytes (header + CRC) All multi-byte fields are little-endian

g.title: RecordType enum BEGIN=1, UPDATE=2, COMMIT=3, ABORT=4, CLR=5, CHECKPOINT=6
uint64_t Previous record in same txn (0 for first record)
uint32_t Total record size (header + payload + CRC)
RecordType enum BEGIN=1, UPDATE=2, COMMIT=3, ABORT=4, CLR=5, CHECKPOINT=6
uint64_t Previous record in same txn (0 for first record)
uint32_t Total record size (header + payload + CRC)
